name: Buckeye Gold Pawn & Loan
description_short: Buckeye Gold Pawn & Loan is a pawn shop in Chillicothe, Ohio that buys and sells jewelry, tools, electronics, firearms, and other items, offering collateral-based loans with a 90-day term.
description_long:
Buckeye Gold Pawn & Loan operates a pawn shop located at 750 Western Ave in Chillicothe, Ohio, at the corner of Western Ave and Woodbridge Ave. The business is licensed (License #: PB.100681.000) and positions itself as a customer-service focused alternative to typical pawn shops in the area. The company maintains two phone numbers (614-793-4653 and 740-773-4653) and operates under professional management with staff who have diverse professional backgrounds.

The company offers three core services: pawn loans, buying items for cash, and selling inventory. For pawn loans, customers need only a valid ID and proof of item ownership to access quick cash with a 90-day loan term and interest and storage fees accruing monthly. They buy a broad range of items including gold, silver, and platinum jewelry; coins; diamonds; tools; electronics and gaming systems; firearms; sporting goods; musical instruments; and solid silver flatware. Their resale inventory mirrors what they purchase, allowing customers to buy the same categories of items.

Buckeye Gold distinguishes itself through emphasis on inventory quality and customer service, explicitly stating "We are not your average pawn shop." The company expanded its Chillicothe location from a coin and jewelry business into a full pawn shop in 2017. Store managers Justin and Brian bring professional backgrounds in store management, customer service, and culinary arts, suggesting operational stability. The company's willingness to evaluate items beyond their standard list, contingent on resale viability and condition, provides flexibility.

As a pawn operation, Buckeye Gold serves customers needing immediate liquidity through collateral-based loans rather than credit-based lending. The 90-day term with monthly accruing fees means borrowers must either repay or refinance within this window. Like all pawn operations, this is a short-term financial solution best suited for individuals with valuable items but without access to traditional credit. The business model is straightforward but inherently transactional rather than relationship-based.
pros: Licensed pawn operation (License #: PB.100681.000) in Chillicothe, Ohio
Quick pawn loans requiring only valid ID and item ownership—no credit check
Broad inventory range across jewelry, tools, electronics, firearms, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Flexible item evaluation policy: will assess any item in good condition with resale market potential
Professional management with staff emphasizing customer service quality
Extended hours including Saturday availability (10am-3pm) for working customers
Simple 90-day pawn loan term with transparent interest and storage fee structure
cons: Pawn loans are short-term (90 days) with monthly accruing interest and storage fees, creating refinancing burden
No information provided about specific interest rates, storage fees, or loan-to-value ratios
Limited to customers with physical collateral of sufficient value; unsuitable for those without saleable items
Pawn loans do not build credit history and offer no path to improved financial standing
No online account management, loan status tracking, or digital application process mentioned
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash who own valuable items (jewelry, tools, electronics, firearms)
People with poor credit or no credit history seeking liquidity without credit checks
Sellers of gold, silver, coins, or other precious metals seeking fair market valuation
Short-term borrowers who can repay within 90 days and prefer collateral-based terms
diagnosis: Buckeye Gold Pawn & Loan is best for individuals holding valuable physical collateral who need emergency cash quickly and lack traditional credit access. The main caveat is that pawn loans are inherently short-term (90 days) with monthly accruing fees, creating a refinancing cycle rather than a sustainable financial solution—this is appropriate only for temporary liquidity needs, not ongoing financial management.
services: Pawn loans with 90-day terms and monthly interest/storage fees
Purchase of gold, silver, and platinum jewelry
Purchase and sale of coins (including precious metals coins)
Electronics and gaming system buying and resale
Sporting goods and equipment buying and resale
General merchandise evaluation for purchase (items with resale market)
